title: Rosy, My Dear,
content:
"Rosy, my dear,
        Don't cry,--I'm here
        To help you all I can.
        I'm only a fly,
        But you'll see that I
        Will keep my word like a man."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Louisa May Alcott delivers a powerful performance in "Rosy, My Dear,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
